programmes.show_description: Colin 'Coco' Brown introduces us to the ten alpacas at his animal rescue centre - all needing to be sheared. (Ep14)

Ross tries to convince Rachel that her date is psychotic. Joey's play gets terrible reviews, but romance with his co-star progresses.
Moments after the deadly explosion at the Chernobyl power plant, we hear from those who worked at the plant and those who tackled the disaster first hand. (Ep2)
Can a wealthy family help a pole-dancing mum's dream come true? Andrea and Matt, who live in a large Victorian property with son, swap lives with family who have just £71 a week.
...Martin's Antiques Showdown. Paul and David Elstob have the chance to bag a big money star lot. Who will come out on top to win the North Yorkshire crown? (VS) (Ep40)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Paddington accidentally takes a banana from the cafe without paying for it and must return it before Sophia notices and calls PC Wells. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Nanny Plum teaches the girls some important fairy rules. However, when she is blown away, Ben, Holly and Gaston come to her rescue. (VS)
The Mixmups mix up a detective adventure to try to solve a mystery. Will they be able to trace the cucumber muncher? (Ep31)
Travel across the UK with the PAW Patrol, meeting real-life heroic hounds - from medical detection pups to mountain rescue dogs. These pups make a real difference to peoples' lives!
When Peppa's bike gets a flat tyre that needs mending, Peppa and her friends have fun riding their imaginary bikes and jumping in pretend muddy puddles!
After Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to school on their scooters, he discovers how much fun they are when he decides to ride home.
Preschool animation. Lucy's dad is digging up the meadow and the Little Kingdom is in danger. How can they stop him without being discovered?
In Sandy Versus the Storm, when a big storm approaches, Thomas and company must complete a week's worth of deliveries by the end of the workday whistle.
Sarah tries to turn Trevor into a ukulele star with a rock video, but when things go wrong, Sam ends up as the surprise star of the video.
Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.
When Doctor Hamster tells Grampy Rabbit that she wants to exercise more, he builds something special to help her.
Doctor Hamster comes to school to talk about butterflies.
Pip finds the water from their sprinkler is too cold to play in. So Posy creates an Ocean Explorers game to make him feel brave enough to try the water again.
Scotty stays at home while his friends and Elephant are playing far away, but they want to tell him about the fun they are having. They discover how to make a cup and string telephone.
Paddington accidentally takes a banana from the cafe without paying for it and must return it before Sophia notices and calls PC Wells, but Mrs. Bird turns it into a cake.
...Rescue. Double-length episode. Carlos and Tracker get stranded on an island in the search for buried treasure.
The Cadets spend the day at Blackpool Zoo, teaming up with Keepers Maddie and Alfie to give Ruby the sea lion a health check and create a fun puzzle feeder for the kea birds.
A Honeybee returns home to her hive to find it abandoned! Sam and Kit enlist the help of a young Honeyguide Bird, to track down the lonely bee's family.
Patrick and Squidina report the news around Bikini Bottom.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Chip shop owner John races to sell his remaining stock before closing for the season, while Val tries to reclaim her sales crown by going viral with her makeup tutorials.
Kirstie rushes to get her holiday home guest-ready and assemble a vital flat-pack table to protect her rental licence, while Simon tackles his first paid photo shoot.

programmes.show_name: Hotel Benidorm: Fun-Loving Brits in the Sun
programmes.show_description: Following staff and guests of the Hotel Benidorm Plaza. A women's rugby team check in, looking to let off steam, and there's also the festival of Semana Santa.

programmes.show_name: Malta: The Jewel of the Med
programmes.show_description: Skilful boat pilots navigate the challenging Grand Harbour - an operation with great risk. We visit the English pub dedicated to the British Navy and one of Malta's most luxurious hotels. (Ep4)
Jane's trip starts in The Everglades or sea of grass as the locals call it. Covering one point five million acres, this wetland is half the size of Yorkshire.
It's the second week of Jane's fabulous Caribbean cruise as she explores Grand Cayman and Belize, and also takes part in a local carnival.
The crowning of Charles III means the Beefeaters' uniforms must be updated to acknowledge the new King. Plus big changes to the moat, and a look at Henry VIII's beloved mother.

programmes.show_name: The Princes in the Tower: A Damning Discovery
programmes.show_description: Actor Jason Watkins and historian Tracy Borman reveal a new discovery that changes everything we thought we knew about the fate of the Princes who vanished from the Tower.
National and international news.
Host Jeremy Vine and team captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman are joined by former England rugby star Ugo Monye and BBC Radio 1's Matt Edmondson to tackle more cryptic puzzles.

programmes.show_name: New: Britain's Best Mattress: How to Sleep Better
programmes.show_description: An old mattress can be a disaster for our wellbeing - and even wreck relationships. But our team of sleep scientists, experts and mattress technologists are here to help!
The ever-competitive Noel and Sue set out to uncover the family heritage of their supersized family on a journey that takes in South Wales, Bollington, Manchester - and France!
Single mum Becky from Essex swaps with Brit millionaire Adam who's made a fortune on Spain's Costa Blanca - she stays in his £2 million Spanish villa while he lives on the breadline.
Captain Luciano has an anxious wait as port officials in Lisbon hold up almost 200 passengers in the terminal. Missing his departure slot could have a serious impact on the cruise.
First-hand accounts of disasters at sea, including a liner crashing into a pier, animal attacks, lightning strikes, and a ship veering towards the path of a tornado.

Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ross seeks medical help when he finds a mysterious skin condition on his backside. Phoebe struggles to choose between two guys. Monica thinks Pete is about to propose.

programmes.show_name: Secret Spitfires: How Britain Won the War
programmes.show_description: The secret history of how - after the Luftwaffe bombed the main manufacturing site of Spitfire aircraft - it was decided these planes would be built in hidden locations.
A chance to see some of Juian and Peter's best bits as they come to the aid of all creatures - great and small.
A chance to see some of Juian and Peter's best bits as they come to the aid of all creatures - great and small.
...Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles. Nick travels from Los Mochis in Sinaloa to Creel in Chihuahua, witnessing feats of railway engineering and breathtaking landscapes. (VS) (Ep1)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Paddington wins a raffle and a meal for two at Sofia's cafe, but must choose a best friend to go with him, either Jonathan, Judy, Mateo, or Mr Gruber. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: It's almost Christmas and the elves are busy making toys. When there is a problem with the toys, a little bit of magic is needed to save the day. (VS)
Pen Pal: Peppa has a new pen pal, a little donkey from France, named Delphine.
Granny and Grandpa's Attic. Peppa and George are helping Granny and Grandpa Pig tidy their attic, but they have trouble deciding what to throw out.
Tweedy and Fluff find a slide! Tweedy discovers that Fluff likes to go up rather than down until a bit of help and a lot of patience finally puts Fluff at the top. Will he give it a go?
From magic shows to treasure hunts, the gang celebrates friendship and teamwork in a nature-inspired environment. In this show, Squiggle can't find Fluff while playing hide and seek.
...Big Adventures! Raul the Brazilian tank engine wants to beat Thomas in a game but his super-competitive nature gets him into trouble.
On a wildlife sketching trip, Norman wants to find the most spectacular creature to sketch, but this gets a bit tricky when Lily Chen tags along.
The Quarrel: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are best friends. But one day they have a quarrel and decide they are not best friends anymore. Will they ever say sorry?
Paddington learns about bees and decides to help them make honey by planting a flower garden but someone thinks they're weeds!
In the park, the friends try to catch autumn leaves as they begin to fall. Posy gets frustrated when she's unable to grab any.
Travelling Travis's balloon gets caught on Cap'n Turbot's boat, the Flounder, and Travis and Cap'n Turbot wind up on a wayward airborne cruise all the way out into the desert.
A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party?
With a new baby on the way, Mummy and Daddy Pig realise they have run out of space at home! They decide to make their own home bigger with an extension.
Dr Brown Bear suggests Peppa and George have their hearing checked. The audiologist discovers George has a moderate hearing loss in one ear and suggests George tries a hearing aid.
Join Tim Rex as he tackles kid-shaped problems with dino-sized solutions... in space! Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.
Stan, Grace and Brody form a band, but a mystery drummer joins in somewhere across town. Stan and Gran go on a hunt for their invisible bandmate!
Winnie Winnington's cow competitor Mooo-na Lisa and Bettina run away disguised as superheroes at the Super Farm Fair. PAW Patrol must save the day before the Super Animal Contest.
House of Stevies new fashion collection needs a fabulous centrepiece for her runway show. But it's up to Milo, Lofty and Lark to design, make and model their creations.
Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away on important business. But ruling the Little Kingdom is not as easy as it looks...
Peppa has enjoyed her very first holiday abroad, but it is now time to go home. She can't wait to see Suzy and Goldie again.
When Doodle becomes embarrassed, she develops a cringe (she calls it a 'whoops') that spreads through camp.
Olivia finds out how things work with fun experiments you can try at home. Today, she learns all about reactions - from brushing her teeth to making a really big fizz! (Ep1)
Join Derek for a story about the different ways children all over the world travel to school. Some take the bus, some by canoe, through valleys, and over mountains and snow!
Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.
Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.
National and international news.
Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.
Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!
When a rock band reunion ends in murder, Jack and Kate are thrust into a case riddled with secrets and a meticulously-planned alibi, before unveiling a killer hiding in plain sight.
Singer Gaynor gets ready for a big comeback gig as a country music act but she's under pressure with her vocal chords and warming up for her partner's Oasis tribute act.
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
Aged six, Benji decided to turn the family garden into a nature reserve complete with a pond made out of the washing up bowl. He's now raised thousands of pounds for nature charities.
Back on the road, Susan's finds doe-eyed Jersey cows and is knee deep in spuds. And in Guernsey she fires the noon day canon, alongside spectacular beaches and stunning scenery.
Jeremy Vine hosts as team captains Carol Vorderman and Sally Lindsay battle it out, joined by former Olympic athlete Colin Jackson and Coronation Street actor Colson Smith.

programmes.show_name: New: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programmes.show_description: A member of the public reports a car crash with two occupants and a driver who stinks of booze. And a white transit van attempts to ram a police car off the road.
...Taking Down the Shoplifting Gangs. Police piece together incriminating clips to tackle suspects linked to a crime group. In Burnley, cops pursue prolific shoplifting suspects.
Access-all-areas documentary following police at work in real time. A father calls 999 with concerns for the wellbeing of his missing son.
Officers pull over a high-performance vehicle after reports of the driver live streaming at speeds of over 170 miles an hour. And a driver crashes into a lorry after drinking heavily.
